creator: joseph.scott@owp.csus.edu
text:
Add WWW to description of shells/bash1

diff -urN shells/bash1/pkg/DESCR.orig shells/bash1/pkg/DESCR
--- shells/bash1/pkg/DESCR.orig Fri Jan 21 09:19:51 2000
+++ shells/bash1/pkg/DESCR      Fri Jan 21 09:20:33 2000
@@ -6,3 +6,5 @@
 features of Bash that are new to this type of shell, see the file
 `documentation/features.texi'.  There is also a processed DVI file
 there, as well as a large man page.
+
+WWW: http://www.gnu.org/software/bash/
